moderators.language_notes: Extensive language support with 29 languages available across all portal sections

evidence.API_evidence: Steamworks API Reference with interfaces like ISteamApps, ISteamUser, etc. Web API Overview with authentication using Web API Keys
evidence.SDK_evidence: Steamworks SDK documentation, Unity/Unreal Engine integrations, OpenXR Game Engine Integrations, GitHub repository with C++ code
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI-specific features found in the documentation
evidence.language_evidence: Language switcher with 29 languages listed throughout the portal

coding_notes: Platform provides comprehensive game development tools through Steamworks. API=1 based on extensive API documentation. METH=1 as only GET methods explicitly documented. SDK=1 with Unity/Unreal support. ROLE=1 due to OAuth authentication and permission systems. DATA=1 based on developer agreements and terms. STORE=1 as Steam Workshop allows third-party content. MON=1 due to revenue sharing with developers. OPEN=1 as registration appears to be free self-service.
